benefits.description: Myostatin inhibitors and androgens promote muscle hypertrophy
BPC-157 and TB-500 for injury recovery
TB-500 allows more blood flow to muscles and helps with recovery

protocol_notes: Hypothetical stack for bodybuilders age mid-30s or older. Includes: Creatine, multivitamin (methylcobalamin, P5P, folate, mixed tocopherols, zinc, iodine, selenium), anserine/carnosine, Alpha-GPC, Hydroxyproline, electrolytes, metformin (30 min before meals), IPH-AGAA, taurine, Demoxytocin (after workouts), Kisspeptin-10 (elevates natural LH/FSH), PEG-MGF (between meals for hyperplasia), Carbetocin (before bed for recovery), Cialis (before workout), 5-amino-1MQ (with NMN/NAD+ and food), BCAA, RAD140 (60hr half-life), rhbFGF (for costal cartilage growth), glutamine peptides + L-glutamine, b-endorphin, ACE-2494 (myostatin inhibitor), ACE-083 (localized myostatin inhibitor), PGE1/PGE2/PGF2 (skeletal muscle hypertrophy), SS-31 (androgen biosynthesis), TVS167, fiber, CES device (1-4hz before bed, 8-12/12-40/40-100hz before gym), TB-500 IM. Minimal stack alternative: IPH-AGAA, PEG-MGF, Kisspeptin-10, ACE-2494. For gyno prevention: Glycyrrhetinic Acid & Aminophylline cream or cavitation device (40khz). OP notes estrogen is important for heart health. Kisspeptin presented as alternative to HCG and potentially to TRT.
